daily.today_energy: Mercury's got your back today, Virgo. You're in that sweet spot where your intuition and logic are finally vibing together. Trust the clarity you're feeling—it's the real deal.
daily.love: Someone's noticing the shift in your energy. Whether you're coupled up or solo, today's about showing up authentically. Stop overthinking the small moments—they're where the magic actually lives.
daily.career: Your attention to detail is about to pay off in ways you didn't expect. A project or conversation you've been sitting with might finally click into place. Go with your gut on that idea.
daily.health: Your nervous system's been working overtime. Today's a gentle reminder to do something that actually feels nourishing—not just productive. Rest counts as self-care, bestie.

weekly.overview: Mercury's dancing through your sector of self-expression this week, Virgo. You're getting clarity on what actually matters to you versus what you've been pretending to care about. Trust the plot twist that's coming.
weekly.love: If you've been holding back, the energy is inviting you to be messier and more authentic. Your people can handle the real version of you. Single? Someone's noticing your vibe shift and they're into it.
weekly.career: Your creative problem-solving is unmatched right now. That thing you've been overthinking? Fresh perspective incoming. Let yourself experiment instead of perfecting everything before you start.
weekly.health: Your nervous system is asking for gentler rhythms. The motivation is there, but so is the whisper to rest intentionally. Moving your body in ways that feel good (not punishing) hits different this week.
